title: Action Write Surface (Fearless Refactor v1)
problem: This lane froze the default app-lane write-side budget on `cx.actions()` and now exists to preserve the closeout evidence without accidentally reopening archived scope.

repro.summary: Historical closeout validation for the frozen write budget.
commands: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex-verify cargo nextest run -p fretboard-dev template

gates.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex-verify cargo nextest run -p fretboard-dev template

continue_policy.notes: Do not reopen this lane from archived TODO rows. Start a narrower follow-on only if fresh cross-surface evidence shows the frozen write budget is no longer sufficient.
